text_block_list.name: Daiwa Scarlet
text_block_list.text:
Excuse me! Thank you very much for taking 
time to come see my race the other day!

text_block_list.name: Air Groove
text_block_list.text: Yes, and what an excellent race it was.

text_block_list.name: Air Groove
text_block_list.text:
I know you changed your running style 
shortly before the race, but you managed 
to pull it off splendidly.

text_block_list.name: Daiwa Scarlet
text_block_list.text:
Naturally! I would never dare to ignore 
advice from you of all people!

text_block_list.name: Air Groove
text_block_list.text:
Frankly, I was… worried that my words may 
have placed a heavy burden on you.

text_block_list.name: Air Groove
text_block_list.text:
But I see now that there was no 
cause for concern. Your diligence 
is not something to be trifled with.
